source: A0 Boundary Kernel v0.8.2, Boundary-Status Index
status: proposed baseline; not claimed final for every implementation

statuses.UNRESOLVED: Not yet presented for formal handling; possible but unsettled.
statuses.CANDIDATE: Appeared as a state or action that may need evaluation.
statuses.MEASURED: Locally observed, resolved, or classified for a declared purpose.
statuses.REJECTED: Failed declared admissibility and must not proceed toward commitment.
statuses.EXPIRED: No longer active, relevant, or eligible for commitment.

separate_axis.note: An attempt outcome does not itself rewrite candidate lifecycle status.
